entities.name: NITRAPYRIN
entities.description: A nitrification inhibitor used to prevent the loss of ammonified nitrogen)

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting ammonium to nitrate)

entities.name: DENITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting nitrate to nitrogen gas)

entities.name: AMMONIUM
entities.description: Ammonified nitrogen (NH4+ N) released during soil incubation)

entities.name: SOIL-WATER SYSTEM
entities.description: A submerged soil environment used for incubation)

entities.name: INCUBATION
entities.description: The process of maintaining soil samples under specific conditions to measure nitrogen release)

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The thermal condition of 30°C maintained during incubation)

entities.name: PH LEVEL
entities.description: The acidity or alkalinity of the soil, specifically near neutral to alkaline)

entities.name: NITROGEN GAS
entities.description: An inert gas atmosphere (N2) used to exclude air and prevent nitrogen loss)
